$comment: Copy to .cofounder/rules.json at your project root. This is the reconciliation layer — maps task shapes to the project docs and verify rules that apply. The UserPromptSubmit and PreToolUse hooks classify incoming work against these shapes and inject the rules automatically. Start small; add shapes as you notice friction.

verify: Uses the design-system type scale (no ad-hoc fontSize: 17)
Touch targets ≥ 44×44pt
Left-aligned text unless hero/empty state
Animations under 250ms unless expressive
One primary action per screen
Used `pnpm commit -- --type <type> --scope <scope> --message "..."`
NEVER raw `git commit`
No Co-Authored-By trailer, no emoji, no AI attribution
Subject is imperative and lowercase (conventional-commits style)
No secrets in logs or error messages
User input validated at the trust boundary
Tokens stored in keychain (mobile) or httpOnly+Secure+SameSite cookies (web)
Consider calling @cofounder:security-auditor before shipping
NOT NULL columns have a backfill plan for existing rows
Locking behavior checked for large tables
Rollback path defined
Consider calling @cofounder:architect-review for schema changes that cross service boundaries
Tests use the project's test runner + assertion style
No mocked database if integration test
One assertion per behavior; avoid catch-all snapshots
